title: onosma psammophila
intro: Onosma psammophila, also known as the sand-onosma, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and hairy leaves. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Onosma psammophila has been found to have various health benefits, including wound healing, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating skin infections and other conditions. Herbal preparations of Onosma psammophila include infusions and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
